name: HCM_BULK_SEED_HIER_LEVELS_GT
description: Global Temporary Table used during bulk seed SQL processing. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: TABLE_NAME
columns.Comments: Table name. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_SKID
columns.Comments: The FUSION_SEED surrogate key identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: LEVEL_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The dependency level of the row. Oracle internal use only.
